REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (28 Garnett Terrace, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Theophilus Obayemi specially appeared for Attorney William Taylor for Latonya Collins.

The sale was confirmed at $335,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for August 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Application To:Advance Hearing Of Petition For Confirmation Of Sale On Calendar; Shorten Time For Notice Of Petn. For Confirmation Of Sale; And To Vacate Order Confirming Sale
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (38 Garnett Terrace, San Francisco Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William A. Taylor for and with Latonya Collins.

The sale was confirmed at $335,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 10, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked account in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for July 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
